headline: How The Fiserv (FISV) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Reset Growth And Valuation Targets
summary: Fiserv’s updated fair value estimate has been trimmed from US$84.75 to US$69.96, bringing the modeled target closer to current revenue assumptions and recent model revisions. Bullish and bearish analysts alike are recalibrating around this range, with price targets spanning roughly US$58 to US$65 as they weigh merchant survey data, execution comments, and differing views on the company’s growth reset. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets shape the evolving narrative and...

headline: Is Morgan Stanley Stock Outperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: As Morgan Stanley has outperformed the Nasdaq Composite over the past year, analysts remain fairly upbeat about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Morgan Stanley resets MongoDB stock price target after earnings
summary: There is a specific kind of earnings report that is genuinely hard to read.
